title: TDR - Trade Duty Refund | Ron Shepherd's Profile
description: Check Ron's details and schedule a chat to find out how much TDR can make you save on your reverse logistics budget.
bio: As former President of UPS Trade Advisory Services, Inc., Ron led initiatives in U.S. trade compliance, southern border logistics, and global supply chain optimization. Ron brings deep expertise in managing import/export compliance, optimizing transportation strategies, and integrating regulatory requirements into seamless business operations.
skills:
• Global Trade Compliance & U.S. Customs: Ron offers deep expertise in U.S. trade compliance, customs regulations, and CBP guidelines, with proven success in managing import/export compliance and optimizing duty spend strategies for seamless cross-border operations.
  • Customs Brokerage & Classification: With extensive experience in customs brokerage, Ron specializes in product classification, paperwork management, and duty optimization strategies, helping businesses navigate complex international trade requirements.
  • Supply Chain & Logistics Management: Ron provides strategic leadership in transportation management, freight forwarding, warehousing, and international logistics, with a focus on process optimization and lean methodologies to enhance operational performance.
  • Trade Advisory & Regulatory Expertise: Drawing from his role as President of UPS Trade Advisory Services, Ron delivers comprehensive trade advisory services, regulatory compliance frameworks, and risk assessment strategies to ensure business growth and operational efficiency.
  • Operational Leadership: Unlike purely advisory profiles, Ron has directly managed large-scale operations, led trade compliance teams, and implemented compliance-driven solutions that align with corporate objectives across multiple business units.
geo: Ron Shepherd's expertise covers global trade operations with a primary focus on the United States, including southern border logistics. His experience spans customs brokerage, international shipping, and supply chain management across North America and global markets. He is based in Aiken, South Carolina, USA.
